qa_pairs.question: What are the required modules for running GROMACS-Plumed v2019.6 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2018.3 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS-Plumed v2019.6 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2018.3 environment, you need to load the following modules: `StdEnv/2018.3 gcc/7.3.0 openmpi/3.1.2 gromacs-plumed/2019.6`.

qa_pairs.question: Which PLUMED version is paired with GROMACS v2019.6 in the gromacs-plumed module for StdEnv/2018.3?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS v2019.6 is paired with PLUMED v2.5.4 in the gromacs-plumed module for StdEnv/2018.3.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are needed to run GROMACS-Plumed v2019.6 with GPU acceleration (CUDA) in the StdEnv/2018.3 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For GPU acceleration with GROMACS-Plumed v2019.6 in StdEnv/2018.3, the following modules must be loaded: `StdEnv/2018.3 gcc/7.3.0 cuda/10.0.130 openmpi/3.1.2 gromacs-plumed/2019.6`.

qa_pairs.question: What notes are provided for the GROMACS-Plumed v2019.6 module under StdEnv/2018.3?
qa_pairs.answer: The notes for the GROMACS-Plumed v2019.6 module under StdEnv/2018.3 indicate it uses GCC & MKL.

qa_pairs.question: Which PLUMED version is associated with GROMACS v2019.5 in the gromacs-plumed module for StdEnv/2018.3?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS v2019.5 is associated with PLUMED v2.5.3 in the gromacs-plumed module for StdEnv/2018.3.

qa_pairs.question: What is the module command for running GROMACS-Plumed v2019.5 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2018.3 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: The module command for running GROMACS-Plumed v2019.5 on CPUs in StdEnv/2018.3 is `StdEnv/2018.3 gcc/7.3.0 openmpi/3.1.2 gromacs-plumed/2019.5`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load the GPU-enabled version of GROMACS-Plumed v2019.5 for StdEnv/2018.3?
qa_pairs.answer: To load the GPU-enabled version of GROMACS-Plumed v2019.5 for StdEnv/2018.3, use the following modules: `StdEnv/2018.3 gcc/7.3.0 cuda/10.0.130 openmpi/3.1.2 gromacs-plumed/2019.5`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the compilation notes for GROMACS-Plumed v2019.5 in the StdEnv/2018.3 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: The compilation notes for GROMACS-Plumed v2019.5 in StdEnv/2018.3 state that it was compiled with GCC & MKL.
